decision_points.description: Inspect the lead target profile before selecting a first validation experiment.

citations.title: Open Targets: a platform for therapeutic target identification and validation
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed target-validation platform paper supporting target-profile inspection before experiment selection.

decision_points.description: Select the orthogonal cytokine-response assay as the best first de-risking experiment for the leading target.

decision_points.description: Keep the validation run focused on the lead target rather than drifting across the candidate set.

citations.title: Validating therapeutic targets through human genetics
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed review supporting focused target validation against therapeutic hypotheses before broader branching.
